title: GL4ES Fix
description: A mod that fixes gl4es rendering issues in legacy Minecraft versions on mobile launchers
body:
This is a simple mod that fixes gl4es rendering issues in legacy Minecraft versions on mobile launchers by switching rendering from triangles to quads

![Before and After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5990fcd681a0d8593e13d6f99460043e2713ae71_0.webp)

## Installation
### Babric and Risugami's ModLoader
1. Install Babric or ModLoader
2. Download the mod and place it in the `mods` folder
### Java Agent
1. Download the java agent and place it in the `.minecraft` folder
2. Add `-javaagent:GL4ESFix_v1.0-javaagent.jar -Dgl4esfix.mcVersion=<version>` to your jvm arguments
3. Replace `<version>` with one of the supported Minecraft versions below

Supported versions: b1.7.x, b1.6.x, b1.5.x, b1.4.x, b1.3.x, b1.2.x, b1.1.x, b1.0.x, a1.2.6, a1.2.5-a1.2.3, a1.2.2, a1.2.1_01-a1.2.0, a1.1.x, a1.0.17_04-a1.0.17_02, a1.0.16, a1.0.15, a1.0.14, a1.0.13, a1.0.12-a1.0.11, a1.0.10, a1.0.9, a1.0.8_01, a1.0.7, a1.0.6, a1.0.5_01, a1.0.5, a1.0.4, a1.0.3-inf_20100630, inf_20100629-inf_20100627, inf_20100625-inf_20100611
